title: Feels Like Home – Hypixel Skyblock
description: A Hypixel Skyblock modpack designed to replicate the feeling you were used to in 1.8
body:
# Feels Like Home

The goal of this pack is to provide, within reason, a similar experience for Hypixel Skyblock players that they are used to on 1.8.9. To that end, it doesen't just include mods, it also includes config files that enable and spotlight mods' features which are most similar to their 1.8 counterparts.

## Included Mods

<details>
<summary>Expand List</summary>

- Skyblock Mods
  - Skyblock Tweaks
  - Skyblocker
  - Firmament
  - SkyCubed
  - SkyOcean
  - SkyBlock Custom Scoreboard
  - SkyBlock Profile Viewer
- Performance Mods
  - Sodium
  - Sodium Extra
  - Entity Culling
  - Ferrite Core
  - Lithium
- Visual Mods
  - Iris Shaders
  - NoMenuBlur
  - YellowText
  - Model Gap Fix
  - Gamma Utils
  - Scoreboard Tweaks
  - Overlay Tweaks
  - TipTapShow
  - Better Mount HUD
  - Zoomify
  - Tooltip Scroll
  - Reese's Sodium Options
  - TipTapShow
  - Tooltip Scroll
  - Continuity
- Utility Mods
  - SaveMyKeybinds
  - Amecs Reborn
  - No Chat Reports
  - Roughly Enough Items
  - Chat Patches
  - Auth Me
- Misc/Library Mods
  - Fabric API
  - ModMenu
  - OptiGui
  - EntityTextureFeatures
  - MixinTrace
  - Cloth Config
  - Fabric Language Kotlin
  - YetAnotherConfigLib
  - Architectury API
  - Your Options Shall Be Respected



</details>

## Helpful Tips

- **Commands**: Although most SkyBlock mods do, many other 1.21 mods don't have config commands. Instead, they are configured through ModMenu (the "Mods" button in your pause menu)
- **SBT HUDs**: Most of the default on screen HUD elements come from SkyblockTweaks `(/sbt config)`
  - If you want to revert to the vanilla/action bar displays for health, mana, defense, and skill progress, you'll need to both disable the HUDs and re-enable showing them in `Action Bar Filters`/`Hud Tweaks` in `General`
- **Compact Tab**: The compact tab is from SkyCubed `/skycubed`
- **REI**: The side overlay is from REI, you can hide it with `CTRL + o` (or CMD if you're on mac)
  - The Skyblock items in it are provided by Firmament
- **Scoreboard**: The custom scoreboard on the side is from Skyblock Custom Scoreboard
  - If you disable it, you can still customize the vanilla scoreboard with Scoreboard Tweaks
- **Keystrokes**: The keystrokes are from TipTapShow
  - In the TTS config, there's no way to position the keystrokes by dragging, you need to manually use the X and Y offset sliders
  
  

## Still in Alpha

Feels Like Home is still in alpha, and many changes will come in the future. Resource packs and mods will be added, and configs will no doubt be tweaked. Also, a note about default GUI positions: I tried to make them reasonable, but they won't be perfect and will probably require modification by the user, particularly if you use an unusual GUI scale.

**I value your feedback, please leave some in the Discord**
